title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model for physical AI that trains on video, audio, text, and action data. It forms part of NVIDIA's integrated physical AI stack alongside Vera and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot. The system enables robots to perceive, plan, and act in the real world.
